Deploying a deep learning model on AWS requires careful planning and execution. * * *  
Model training and validation are conducted on AWS EC2 instances, ensuring computational resources are optimized. * * *  
Data security and overfitting are critical considerations, with regular audits and validation checks in place. * * *  
Model deployment involves containerization with Docker and deployment on AWS Elastic Beanstalk or SageMaker. * * *
